entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic material of one or more species used for breeding and research

entities.name: FARM PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input

entities.name: COLLECTION
entities.description: The process of gathering genetic resources

entities.name: EVALUATION
entities.description: The process of assessing the characteristics of genetic resources

entities.name: UTILIZATION
entities.description: The use of genetic resources for breeding or research

entities.name: CONSERVATION
entities.description: The preservation of genetic resources to prevent loss

entities.name: EXCHANGE
entities.description: The sharing of germplasm between institutions or countries

entities.name: GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Genetic or biochemical material of plant genetic resources of actual or potential value

entities.name: BIODIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of life in the world or in a particular habitat or ecosystem

entities.name: CROP PLANTS
entities.description: Plants grown for food, fiber, or other economic purposes

entities.name: GENETIC MANIPULATION
entities.description: The process of altering the genetic makeup of an organism

entities.name: GENETIC ENGINEERING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Specific laboratory methods used to modify the DNA of an organism

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics

entities.name: PLANT QUARANTINE SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems designed to prevent the introduction and spread of pests and diseases during germplasm exchange

relationships.description: Free exchange and availability of germplasm enables farm productivity
Collection is a key activity for managing genetic resources
Evaluation is a key activity for managing genetic resources
Utilization is a key activity for managing genetic resources
Conservation is a key activity for managing genetic resources
Exchange is a key activity for managing genetic resources
Genetic resources are a component of global biodiversity
Conservation efforts are focused on the genetic resources of crop plants
Genetic manipulation is accelerated by the application of genetic engineering techniques
Free exchange of diverse germplasm is essential for progress
ICRISAT implements plant quarantine systems for germplasm exchange
